description: This file defines a Spring Data JPA repository interface for managing EmailVerificationToken entities, providing methods for finding tokens by token string and deleting tokens by associated user ID.

classes.name: EmailVerificationTokenRepository
classes.description: A repository interface for EmailVerificationToken entities providing database operations.

methods.name: findByToken
methods.description: Retrieves an EmailVerificationToken entity by its token string.

methods.name: deleteByUserId
methods.description: Deletes email verification tokens associated with a specific user ID.
